name: xyo-skills
description: Full-stack agent skills for building dApps on the XL1 blockchain. Covers XYO primitives, XL1 chain operations, toolchain config, and prescriptive design patterns (commit-reveal, indexing, prediction markets).
longDescription: A layered skill stack for building XL1 dApps and XYO protocol integrations, including scaffold tooling, design patterns, chain knowledge, XYO primitives, TypeScript toolchain guidance, and development workflow standards.
